title: Cracken (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cracken''' can refer to several things:

==Canon==
*'''[[Airen Cracken]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[general]] and [[Chief of Intelligence|Chief of Rebel Intelligence]]
*'''[[Cracken's Crew]]''', a team of Rebel operatives formerly under Airen Cracken's command

==Legends==
*The '''Cracken family''', [[Human/Legends|human]] family from [[Contruum]] which included amongst its members important figures in the military and intelligence branches of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
**'''[[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]''', [[General/Legends|general]] and [[Chief of Intelligence/Legends|Chief of Intelligence]] for the Rebel Alliance and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
**'''[[Josta Cracken]]''', wife of Airen Cracken
**'''[[Pash Cracken]]''', son of Airen and Josta and noted [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the Rebel Alliance and New Republic
**'''[[Dena Cracken]]''', daughter of Airen and Josta
*The '''[[Cracken Flight Group]]''', also known as '''Cracken's Flight Group''', an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] unit commanded by Pash Cracken
*'''[[Cracken's Crew/Legends|Cracken's Crew]]''', a team of Rebel operatives formerly under Airen Cracken's command
*'''''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide]]''''', a report written by Airen Cracken
*'''''[[Wanted by Cracken]]''''', a report written by Airen Cracken
*'''[[Cracken Twist]]''', a strategy devised by Pash Cracken

==Real world==
*'''''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|Cracken's Rebel Field Guide]]'''''
**"'''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide: Scanners]]'''," a ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' article based on the above book
**"'''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide: Slicing Aids]]'''," a ''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' article based on the above book
*'''''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'''''
**"'''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)]]'''," a series of ''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' articles based on the above book
*'''''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'''''
*'''[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]'''
**"'''[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)]]'''," a series of ''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' articles based on the above book
*"'''[[The Cracken Twist]]'''," a vignette in ''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' and ''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''

{{Disambig}}
